Title: Minimalist Pocket T-Shirt - Light Green Unisex Crewneck Tee
Description:
Elevate your everyday style with this minimalist and versatile pocket tee. Crafted from a soft, breathable cotton blend, it offers ultimate comfort for any occasion.

The light green hue provides a fresh, neutral base, while the subtle, abstract pocket design adds a modern, artistic touch without overwhelming your look.

Key Features & Benefits:

  • Effortlessly Stylish: The clean, classic crewneck silhouette ensures you look polished whether dressing it up or keeping it casual.
  • Superior Comfort: Made from premium material that feels soft against the skin and maintains its shape wash after wash.
  • Versatile Design: Perfect for layering, running errands, or a weekend outing. It’s a staple piece that goes with everything.
  • Sustainable Appeal: Ideal for building a capsule wardrobe with high-quality, enduring basics.

Sizing & Care: We recommend checking the size guide for the perfect fit. Machine wash cold with like colors to maintain vibrancy.

Whether you're gifting it to a friend or treating yourself, this tee is the perfect blend of comfort and understated style.
